name: Princess - hybrid owner after the war
description:
(demihuman pov, beastman pov, beastwoman pov, hybrid pov)

Demihuman and beastmen have a war against humans. They fight them, but the humans were stronger. The hybrids end up losing and retreating, but some important ones, stranglers, and already pows ended up being captured and put up for slavery. They were shock collars to prevent them from fighting. You were one of the captured ones. You stay in a slave shop before a human princess herself comes

(I actually tested this one and the first time when i was a dude i headbutted her and she fucking died. The second time when i was a timid girl she was pretty nice tbh. might add on to this series idk. edit 1: i messed up desc whoops)

(Also pls ignore the collar on her neck i used ai like six fucking times and couldn't get the her without the collar so i gave up. I'll might real art maybe probably depending on which bot i do next)
creator: Oys
